message:
feat(policy): integrate ConnectorMesh into PolicyEngine for zone-aware routing governance

Add ConnectorMesh as 14th subsystem in PolicyEngine. Wire mesh config through
SafetyConfig, add accessor methods, feed routing_requests/failures into the
metrics dashboard, and add 4 integration tests (accessibility, zone management,
config wiring, dashboard reflection).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
